action_item_for_main_agent:
✅ MLB Engine V7 FALSE_COMPETITIVE_UNDERDOG implementation verified:

**Backend (100% Pass)**:
- All pure functions working correctly (top offense detection, weak bullpen detection, gap calculation)
- CANONICAL Yankees @ Athletics case: BLOCK + SWAP to Run Line -1.5 (Yankees) score 83
- PENALTY-ONLY case: gap 17 → penalty -10 applied
- NEGATIVE case: non-target markets untouched
- NO-RISK case: balanced match-ups (gap < 15) no action
- Sport-gating verified: football/basketball do NOT have V7 fields

**Frontend**:
- MLBFalseCompetitiveUnderdogBadge component properly wired in MatchCard.jsx (lines 211-222)
- Component renders BLOCK mode (red header) and PENALTY mode (amber header)
- Badge shows severity, gap, narrative, alternative markets, and factor chips

**Integration**:
- V7 block inserted in orchestrator after V6 (lines 995-1029)
- Pick payload includes _mlb_false_competitive_underdog, false_competitive_underdog_severity, false_competitive_underdog_block
- Trap signals added when applicable

**Limitation**: No MLB games available today for end-to-end UI testing. Frontend component code review shows correct implementation. Recommend testing with live MLB data when games are available.
